mission_title: The Weaver 1.0 — Standalone Multi-Source Creative Weaving and Twine-Ready Output

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
actual=hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
expected='7fba1af79392eb263a0bf324ef7f2b99236ff213c3f7fcbacd2c5135cec9a894'
assert actual==expected, f'installed hash mismatch: {actual}'
print('THE_WEAVER_1_0_EXACT_HASH_OK')
validations.name: Verify exact installed Weaver payload SHA-256

argv:
from pathlib import Path
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
s=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
compile(s,str(p),'exec')
required=(
    'FOXAI_THE_WEAVER_V1_CSS_START',
    'FOXAI_THE_WEAVER_V1_HTML_START',
    'FOXAI_THE_WEAVER_V1_JS_START',
    'FOXAI_THE_WEAVER_V1_BACKEND_START',
    "FOLDERS['kayock_writer_weaver_outputs']",
    "go('weaver')",
    'Open The Weaver',
    'accept=".txt,.md,text/plain,text/markdown"',
    'new FileReader()',
    'reader.readAsText(file)',
    'The local file was read only and not changed.',
    '/api/writer/weaver/generate',
    '/api/writer/weaver/save',
    '/api/open/kayock_writer_weaver_outputs',
    'kayock_writer_weaver_generate',
    'kayock_writer_weaver_save',
    'Shared soul',
    'Braided voices',
    'Best threads',
    'New tapestry',
    'Twine-ready passages',
)
missing=[item for item in required if item not in s]
assert not missing, 'missing Weaver markers: '+', '.join(missing)
print('THE_WEAVER_1_0_PYTHON_LOCAL_FILE_AND_FEATURE_MARKERS_OK')
validations.name: Verify Python syntax, standalone room, and local txt/md loading markers

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, os, re, shutil, subprocess, sys, tempfile
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
source=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
tree=ast.parse(source)
html_value=None
for item in tree.body:
    if isinstance(item,(ast.Assign,ast.AnnAssign)):
        targets=item.targets if isinstance(item,ast.Assign) else [item.target]
        if any(isinstance(t,ast.Name) and t.id=='HTML' for t in targets):
            html_value=ast.literal_eval(item.value)
            break
assert isinstance(html_value,str), 'HTML constant not found'
blocks=re.findall(r'<script(?:\s[^>]*)?>(.*?)</script>',html_value,flags=re.I|re.S)
assert blocks, 'No embedded JavaScript blocks found'
node=shutil.which('node') or shutil.which('node.exe')
if not node:
    candidate=Path(os.environ.get('ProgramFiles',r'C:\Program Files'))/'nodejs'/'node.exe'
    if candidate.is_file():
        node=str(candidate)
assert node, 'Node.js was not found for embedded JavaScript verification'
temp_path=None
try:
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile('w',suffix='.js',encoding='utf-8',delete=False) as handle:
        handle.write('\n;\n'.join(blocks))
        temp_path=handle.name
    result=subprocess.run([str(node),'--check',temp_path],capture_output=True,text=True,shell=False)
    if result.stdout:
        print(result.stdout)
    if result.stderr:
        print(result.stderr,file=sys.stderr)
    assert result.returncode==0, f'Node syntax check failed with return code {result.returncode}'
finally:
    if temp_path:
        try:
            Path(temp_path).unlink()
        except FileNotFoundError:
            pass
print('THE_WEAVER_1_0_EMBEDDED_JAVASCRIPT_OK')
validations.name: Verify embedded interface JavaScript syntax with Node

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, hashlib, json, re
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
source=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
tree=ast.parse(source)
wanted={
    '_weaver_source_text',
    '_weaver_clean_title',
    '_weaver_parse_plan',
    '_weaver_clean_output',
    '_weaver_annotation_flags',
    '_weaver_copy_metrics',
    '_weaver_plan_prompt',
    '_weaver_generation_prompt',
    'kayock_writer_weaver_generate',
}
nodes=[n for n in tree.body if isinstance(n,ast.FunctionDef) and n.name in wanted]
assert {n.name for n in nodes}==wanted
ns={
    're':re,
    'json':json,
    'hashlib':hashlib,
    '_writer_text':lambda value,limit: str(value or '')[:limit],
    '_writer_voice_profile_id':lambda value:'',
    'build_writer_voice_prompt':lambda *args:'',
}
exec(compile(ast.Module(body=nodes,type_ignores=[]),str(p),'exec'),ns)
responses=iter([
    {'ok':True,'poem':json.dumps({
        'suggested_title':'Threads of the Road',
        'shared_threads':['memory','choice'],
        'structure':'Start, turning point, choice, ending',
        'source_roles':[{'title':'The Road','role':'memory'},{'title':'The Door','role':'choice'}],
        'passage_plan':['Start','Crossroads','Home'],
    })},
    {'ok':True,'poem':'Source 1: [Note: draft]\nThis output is contaminated.'},
    {'ok':True,'poem':':: Start\n\nThe road remembers.\n\n[[Follow the light->Home]]\n\n:: Home\n\nThe door opens.'},
])
calls=[]
def chat(*args,**kwargs):
    calls.append((args,kwargs))
    return next(responses)
ns['_poetry_chat']=chat
result=ns['kayock_writer_weaver_generate']({
    'sources':[
        {'title':'The Road','content':'The road remembers every footstep.'},
        {'title':'The Door','content':'A door opens when the light returns.'},
    ],
    'mode':'shared_soul',
    'output_type':'twine',
    'voice':'My natural voice',
    'length':'Short',
    'direction':'Keep the road and door.',
})
assert result.get('ok')
assert result.get('attempts')==2
assert len(calls)==3, f'expected plan, draft, retry calls; got {len(calls)}'
assert result.get('output','').startswith(':: Start\n\n')
assert len(re.findall(r'(?m)^::\s+.+$',result.get('output','')))>=2
assert '[[Follow the light->Home]]' in result.get('output','')
assert not ns['_weaver_annotation_flags'](result.get('output',''))
assert result.get('source_map',{}).get('suggested_title')=='Threads of the Road'
assert result.get('planning_summary_is_editorial_artifact') is True
assert result.get('hidden_chain_of_thought_requested') is False
assert result.get('source_files_modified') is False
assert result.get('source_files_read_only') is True
provenance=(result.get('provenance') or {}).get('sources') or []
assert len(provenance)==2
assert all(len(item.get('sha256',''))==64 for item in provenance)
print('THE_WEAVER_1_0_TWO_STAGE_CLEAN_TWINE_RETRY_AND_PROVENANCE_OK')
validations.name: Verify two-stage source mapping, contaminated-output retry, clean Twine formatting, and provenance hashes

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, hashlib, json, re
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
source=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
tree=ast.parse(source)
wanted={
    '_weaver_source_text',
    '_weaver_clean_title',
    '_weaver_parse_plan',
    '_weaver_clean_output',
    '_weaver_annotation_flags',
    '_weaver_copy_metrics',
    '_weaver_plan_prompt',
    '_weaver_generation_prompt',
    'kayock_writer_weaver_generate',
}
nodes=[n for n in tree.body if isinstance(n,ast.FunctionDef) and n.name in wanted]
ns={
    're':re,
    'json':json,
    'hashlib':hashlib,
    '_writer_text':lambda value,limit: str(value or '')[:limit],
    '_writer_voice_profile_id':lambda value:'',
    'build_writer_voice_prompt':lambda *args:'',
}
exec(compile(ast.Module(body=nodes,type_ignores=[]),str(p),'exec'),ns)
responses=iter([
    {'ok':True,'poem':'{"suggested_title":"Rejected Weave","shared_threads":[],"structure":"test","source_roles":[],"passage_plan":[]}'},
    {'ok':True,'poem':'Source 1: [Note: still contaminated]'},
    {'ok':True,'poem':'Editor note: the following weave combines the sources.'},
])
def chat(*args,**kwargs):
    return next(responses)
ns['_poetry_chat']=chat
result=ns['kayock_writer_weaver_generate']({
    'sources':[
        {'title':'One','content':'First source text.'},
        {'title':'Two','content':'Second source text.'},
    ],
    'mode':'new_tapestry',
    'output_type':'clean_prose',
    'voice':'My natural voice',
    'length':'Short',
})
assert not result.get('ok')
assert result.get('attempts')==2
assert result.get('source_files_modified') is False
assert 'No woven output was accepted or saved' in result.get('message','')
print('THE_WEAVER_1_0_DOUBLE_CONTAMINATION_REJECTION_OK')
validations.name: Verify repeated contaminated output is rejected and remains unsaveable

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, hashlib, json, re
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
source=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
tree=ast.parse(source)
wanted={
    '_weaver_source_text',
    '_weaver_clean_title',
    '_weaver_parse_plan',
    '_weaver_clean_output',
    '_weaver_annotation_flags',
    '_weaver_copy_metrics',
    '_weaver_plan_prompt',
    '_weaver_generation_prompt',
    'kayock_writer_weaver_generate',
}
nodes=[n for n in tree.body if isinstance(n,ast.FunctionDef) and n.name in wanted]
ns={
    're':re,
    'json':json,
    'hashlib':hashlib,
    '_writer_text':lambda value,limit: str(value or '')[:limit],
    '_writer_voice_profile_id':lambda value:'',
    'build_writer_voice_prompt':lambda *args:'',
}
exec(compile(ast.Module(body=nodes,type_ignores=[]),str(p),'exec'),ns)
long_source=' '.join(f'word{i}' for i in range(1,81))
responses=iter([
    {'ok':True,'poem':'{"suggested_title":"Copy Boundary Test","shared_threads":[],"structure":"test","source_roles":[],"passage_plan":[]}'},
    {'ok':True,'poem':long_source+'\n\nA new ending.'},
])
def chat(*args,**kwargs):
    return next(responses)
ns['_poetry_chat']=chat
result=ns['kayock_writer_weaver_generate']({
    'sources':[
        {'title':'Long Source','content':long_source},
        {'title':'Other Source','content':'A second distinct thread for the weave.'},
    ],
    'mode':'shared_soul',
    'output_type':'clean_prose',
    'voice':'My natural voice',
    'length':'Short',
})
assert result.get('ok')
assert result.get('warnings'), 'expected an excessive-copy warning'
assert any('closely matches Long Source' in item for item in result.get('warnings',[]))
metric=next(item for item in result.get('copy_metrics',[]) if item.get('title')=='Long Source')
assert metric.get('longest_verbatim_words',0)>=35
print('THE_WEAVER_1_0_EXCESSIVE_COPY_WARNING_OK')
validations.name: Verify excessive verbatim-copy detection and warning

argv:
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime
import ast, hashlib, json, re, tempfile, time
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
source=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
tree=ast.parse(source)
wanted={
    '_weaver_source_text',
    '_weaver_clean_title',
    'kayock_writer_weaver_save',
}
nodes=[n for n in tree.body if isinstance(n,ast.FunctionDef) and n.name in wanted]
assert {n.name for n in nodes}==wanted
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temp_dir:
    root=Path(temp_dir)
    folder=root/'Outputs'
    def jwrite(path,data):
        path.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
        path.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2),encoding='utf-8')
    ns={
        're':re,
        'json':json,
        'hashlib':hashlib,
        'Path':Path,
        'datetime':datetime,
        'ROOT':root,
        'FOLDERS':{'kayock_writer_weaver_outputs':folder},
        'chat_model':None,
        '_writer_text':lambda value,limit: str(value or '')[:limit],
        'now':lambda:'2026-07-21T02:00:00',
        'slug':lambda value: re.sub(r'[^A-Za-z0-9 _.-]','',value).strip().replace(' ','_')[:80] or 'New_Project',
        'jwrite':jwrite,
    }
    exec(compile(ast.Module(body=nodes,type_ignores=[]),str(p),'exec'),ns)
    provenance={'sources':[
        {'title':'One','sha256':'a'*64,'words':10},
        {'title':'Two','sha256':'b'*64,'words':12},
    ]}
    twine=':: Start\n\nThe door opens.\n\n[[Enter->Inside]]\n\n:: Inside\n\nThe room remembers.'
    tw=ns['kayock_writer_weaver_save']({
        'output':twine,
        'output_type':'twine',
        'title':'Twine Test',
        'provenance':provenance,
        'mode':'braided_voices',
        'voice':'My natural voice',
        'length':'Short',
    })
    assert tw.get('ok') and tw.get('no_overwrite') is True
    created=[Path(item) for item in tw.get('created_files',[])]
    assert len(created)==2
    twee=next(item for item in created if item.suffix=='.twee')
    sidecar=next(item for item in created if item.name.endswith('.weaver.json'))
    twee_text=twee.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    assert twee_text.startswith(':: Start\n\n')
    assert not twee_text.startswith('---')
    assert 'source_provenance' not in twee_text
    metadata=json.loads(sidecar.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    assert metadata.get('source_provenance')==provenance['sources']
    assert metadata.get('source_files_modified') is False
    assert metadata.get('no_overwrite') is True
    md1=ns['kayock_writer_weaver_save']({
        'output':'First woven paragraph.',
        'output_type':'clean_prose',
        'title':'Markdown Test',
        'provenance':provenance,
        'mode':'shared_soul',
        'voice':'My natural voice',
        'length':'Short',
    })
    time.sleep(0.01)
    md2=ns['kayock_writer_weaver_save']({
        'output':'Second woven paragraph.',
        'output_type':'clean_prose',
        'title':'Markdown Test',
        'provenance':provenance,
        'mode':'shared_soul',
        'voice':'My natural voice',
        'length':'Short',
    })
    assert md1.get('ok') and md2.get('ok')
    assert md1.get('created_files')[0]!=md2.get('created_files')[0]
    markdown_files=list(folder.glob('Markdown_Test_*.md'))
    assert len(markdown_files)==2
    assert all('content_type: "weaver_output"' in item.read_text(encoding='utf-8') for item in markdown_files)
print('THE_WEAVER_1_0_TWEE_SIDECAR_MARKDOWN_AND_NO_OVERWRITE_SAVING_OK')
validations.name: Verify no-overwrite Markdown saving and clean Twee plus provenance sidecar saving

argv:
from pathlib import Path
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
s=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
required=(
    'FOXAI_CREATOR_TYPE_1_2_HTML_START',
    'FOXAI_CREATOR_TYPE_1_2_JS_START',
    'FOXAI_CREATOR_TYPE_1_2_BACKEND_START',
    'FOXAI_CREATOR_TYPE_1_2_STORAGE_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_PROFILE_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_HTML_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_JS_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_BACKEND_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_STORAGE_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_1_BACKEND_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_1_STORAGE_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_1_JS_START',
    'ERIC_SHORT_FICTION_PROFILE',
    'ERIC_POET_NARRATOR_PROFILE_V1_START',
    'Eric — Short Fiction',
    'Eric — Poet/Narrator',
    'Robin Hood — The Merry Outlaw',
    'Zorro — The Masked Fox',
    'Dracula — The Ancient Count',
    'Sherlock Holmes — The Consulting Mind',
    'def kayock_writer_poetry_create',
    'def kayock_writer_poetry_polish',
    'def kayock_writer_poetry_revise_selection',
    'def kayock_writer_poetry_archive',
    'KAYOCK_WRITER_CALM_GUIDED_V2_BROWSER_START',
    'KAYOCKS_STUDY_INTEGRATION_V1_HELPERS_START',
    "FOLDERS['kayock_writer_poetry_drafts']",
    "FOLDERS['kayock_writer_poetry_recordings']",
    "FOLDERS['kayock_writer_poetry_legacy']",
    "FOLDERS['kayock_writer_short_story_drafts']",
    "go('storyforge')",
    '/api/writer/poetry/create',
    '/api/writer/poetry/polish',
    '/api/writer/poetry/save',
)
missing=[item for item in required if item not in s]
assert not missing, 'protected feature anchors missing: '+', '.join(missing)
assert "writing_type='poem'" in s
assert "writing_type=='short_story'" in s
assert 'Short Story Creator' in s
assert 'Short Story Polisher' in s
assert 'The Weaver' in s
print('THE_WEAVER_1_0_PROTECTED_FEATURES_OK')
validations.name: Verify Poetry Studio, Short Story Polisher 1.1, Story Forge, Writer, Study, archives, and voice profiles remain present
